# unifi_backup (Data Source)

Lists all available backups on the UniFi controller. Read-only.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "unifi_backup" "all" {}

output "backup_count" {
  value = length(data.unifi_backup.all.backups)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `backups` (Attributes List) List of backups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backups))

<a id="nestedatt--backups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backups`

Read-Only:

- `controller_name` (String)
- `datetime` (String)
- `days` (Number)
- `filename` (String)
- `format` (String)
- `keep_forever` (Boolean)
- `note` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `time` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `version` (String)
